Define what this custom agent does

This custom agent is designed to enhance the blogs on ther personal website by looking at the blogs in great detail and expanding them with more details, examples, and explanations to make them more comprehensive and helpful for readers. Additionally, the agent will check if the animations included in the blogs are working properly to ensure a smooth user experience.
